entries.name: Labrador Retriever
entries.description: The Labrador Retriever, often abbreviated to Labrador, is a breed of retriever-gun dog from the United Kingdom that was developed from imported Canadian fishing dogs.

entries.name: German Shepherd
entries.description: The German Shepherd is a breed of working dog known for its intelligence and versatility as a police, service and working dog.

entries.name: Beagle
entries.description: The Beagle is a breed of small hound that is similar in appearance to the much larger foxhound. The Beagle is a scent hound, developed primarily for hunting hare.
